meaning: n.好感,宠爱,关切,欢心,好意,喜爱vt.支持,赞成,照顾,促成,象,喜欢,证实,赐予
examples: Will you do me a favor, Lamp-Wick?
Could you do me a favor?
I know you will do me this little favor.
He was particularly likely to buy them when they were particularly out of favor.
Workers, consumers and shopkeepers will abandon it in favor of electronic pounds or dollars transmitted from overseas.
